title: indigofera lotononoides
intro: Indigofera lotononoides, also known as Krung, is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family and is native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Indigofera lotononoides include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce oxidative stress. Indigofera lotononoides can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed orally or used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
